sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114975" key="xrusosa/pfeiros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρῡσο-σάπφειρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n114975.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gold-sapphire,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:2:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
